creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wen         2011-01-18 06:05:58 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/dracmail        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    mail/dracmail/files  pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  dracMail is a webmail interface built using PHP, ExtJS (JavaScript framework),
  MySQL and IMAP. Features include: Rich UI, WYSIWYG editor, HTML mail composing
  and message caching.
  
  WWW: http://dracmail.net/
  
  PR:             ports/153987
  Submitted by:   Marian Jamrich <jamrich.majo@gmail.com>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1051    +1 -0      ports/mail/Makefile
  1.1       +53 -0     ports/mail/dracmail/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/mail/dracmail/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +43 -0     ports/mail/dracmail/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/mail/dracmail/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +8557 -0   ports/mail/dracmail/pkg-plist (new)
